texto: You must respect people, and you must respect money. My father said to me: 'When you respect money, money will respect you.'
explicacao: Orientação direta de Yaya Toure sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “You must respect people, and you must respect money. My father said to me: 'When you respect mone…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, money, father, útil em momentos de father e me.

frase_original: You must respect people, and you must respect money. My father said to me: 'When you respect money, money will respect you.'

texto: The mentality with African and European people is different. In Africa, when you come from a difficult life, when it's not so easy to eat, not so easy to survive, you respect money when you start to earn it, and you respect people more. When you respect people, they will respect you, and your life is better for that.
explicacao: Citação de Yaya Toure sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The mentality with African and European people is different. In Africa, when you come from a diff…” articula vida, money, people em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como money e people.

frase_original: The mentality with African and European people is different. In Africa, when you come from a difficult life, when it's not so easy to eat, not so easy to survive, you respect money when you start to earn it, and you respect people more. When you respect people, they will respect you, and your life is better for that.
